visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a bright blue background featuring the text "阿啾小劇場" at the top. Two cartoon avatars of men are positioned at the bottom right, looking up at a screen capture of a website interface for the "2025 文博會". A yellow text box with white text appears at the bottom. (2) The scene shifts to a minimalist white background where a blue line is drawing a stick figure in a kneeling, face-down posture on a blue bed-like surface. The two avatars remain at the bottom right. (3) A screen transition occurs back to the website interface, which now shows two white cards with text. A cartoon avatar of a man with dark hair and a gray t-shirt appears in the center-left, yawning and stretching his arms. (4) The scene cuts back to the blue background with a white stick figure drawing. A yellow border surrounds the central white square. (5) An close-up of an emoji-like face with a squinting, laughing expression appears briefly on a yellow background. (6) The final phase shows the animated character in the gray shirt again, now looking embarrassed with large, teary eyes and a blushing face, while the website interface remains visible behind him.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 阿啾小劇場. [Slogan]: 2025 文博會 南港展覽館 8-7~11 J1-036. [Subtitle]: 請問學長起床的第一件事. [Slogan]: 學長起床的第一件事：把屁股抬高. [Slogan]: 完整影片在Youtube. (2) [Variety]: 哈哈哈. [Subtitle]: 起床是指下床嗎. (3) [Subtitle]: 起床第一件事就是醒來的第一件事情. (4) [Variety]: 咻咻咻. (5) [Subtitle]: 伸縮腰對他會變成膜拜的姿勢. (6) [Subtitle]: 請問對方做過讓你最心動的事情. [Subtitle]: 好吧就這個吧. [Subtitle]: 跟我朋友介紹我. [Subtitle]: 喔所以只有求婚有心動. [Subtitle]: 沒事是最最最心動. [Subtitle]: 妳看心動是不是. [Subtitle]: 妳會瘋狂心動哈哈哈. [Subtitle]: 不知道 沒有比阿啾早起過. [Subtitle]: 好、嗯.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: No real people; 2 main animated male avatars are present throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two 2D animated male characters. One has messy dark hair and wears a gray t-shirt; the other is a simplified bald-headed avatar.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Alternates between a clean blue background with graphic overlays and a screen capture of a web browser interface showing a 'Couple Quiz' style application.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a bright, medium-tempo acoustic guitar melody accompanied by a steady percussion beat. A male voice (A) asks a question in a high-pitched, energetic tone with a playful rising intonation. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX sounds as the prompt is read. A second male voice (B) responds in a slightly deeper, more conversational tone, expressing confusion with a mild vocal pitch drop. (3) A sudden cartoonish 'boing' SFX is heard, followed by a burst of high-pitched laughter from both speakers. The BGM remains consistent in volume and energy. (4) A 'swoosh' transition sound triggers a new phase. Voice A teases voice B with an exaggerated, comedic nasal quality. (5) A loud percussive 'thud' SFX emphasizes a punchline, immediately followed by the sound of a small crowd laughing (SFX). (6) The video concludes with both voices talking rapidly over each other in an excited, high-arousal state, ending with a final bright guitar chord.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Prompts -> Comedic Responses -> Emotional Reactions
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with humorous banter between two characters while subtly promoting the 2025 Cultural Expo (文博會).

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The characters are using a specific website interface clearly branded for the '2025 文博會' (Cultural Expo) throughout the video.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a 'Question and Answer' format typical of social media trends. The high visual text density and rapid-fire audio editing are characteristic of short-form content designed for high engagement.
